_meta.notes: Synthesized PostToolUse stdin for the lead's TaskUpdate(status='completed') on a secretary teachback Task A (this session's task #1, completed by lead after secretary stored teachback metadata). Source files: ~/.claude/tasks/pact-8159e827/1.json (Task A: teachback, owner='secretary', blocks=['2'], blockedBy=[]) + ~/.claude/tasks/pact-8159e827/2.json (Task B: work, owner='secretary', blockedBy=['1']) + ~/.claude/teams/pact-8159e827/config.json (secretary registered as agentType='pact-secretary'). Reproduces the Bug A literal scenario: lead completes teachback Task A while same-teammate work Task B remains pending; under the unfixed hook, count_active_tasks drops to 0 (Task B owned by exempt-agentType pact-secretary is filtered out) → eager Teardown emitted. Fixed hook should defer Teardown via has_same_teammate_continuation. NOTE: production task files persist forward-pointing linkage as `blocks` (populated, e.g., ['2']) NOT `addBlocks` (null/empty in production); the fixture captures both fields with empirical values for predicate-shape resilience.
